top_signals.title: This ETF Tax Loophole Is All the Rage Among Rich Americans
top_signals.summary: A bespoke fund is becoming a must-have tool for wealthy investors looking to defer — and sometimes even avoid — capital gains tax.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: GE Vernova Falls as Outlook Collides With ‘Too High’ AI Hopes
top_signals.summary: GE Vernova Inc.’s shares slid after a higher revenue outlook failed to impress investors, a sign that it’s getting harder for companies that sell equipment to data centers to meet the market’s sky-high hopes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Nestlé nears deal to sell stake in €5bn Perrier unit
top_signals.summary: Swiss group races to agree terms with Platinum Equity for water business, whose brands include San Pellegrino
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: New InfraTrust report reveals infrastructure flaws admins should patch first
top_signals.summary: Eclypsium has launched InfraTrust, a new infrastructure cybersecurity knowledge base and monthly InfraTrust Pulse report designed to help organizations prioritize vulnerabilities affecting infrastructure, firmware, networking, and edge devices. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
